name: Tortilla Chips
recipeIngredient: --thawed in bag, these can be purchased frozen in most supermarkets.
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 275°F.
2. Cut tortillas into four quarters.
3. Lay pieces on a dry baking sheet in a single layer.
4. Bake at 275°F for about 20 to 30 minutes, until crisp.
5. Serve warm or let thaw in bag, remove from bag, wrap in foil or place in covered baking dish, and heat in a warm oven for a few minutes.
Helpful Hints:
Before baking, sprinkle tortillas with some onion powder, garlic powder, or chili powder. This may also be done with pita bread.
Cut into triangles and separate one side from the other.
Lay on a baking sheet and bake as above.
Makes delicious whole wheat crackers for dipping.
